title: Create: Netherless
description: 🚫Gather and automate Nether ressources without ever needing the Nether
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a2e90df8b6efa9c482645f1828f738084374250.png)

**Create: Netherless is an Addon for the** [**Create Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create);


The goal of this mod is to provide players with the possibility of **making and automating most Nether resources** even **without access** to the Nether! This includes Blazes, Netherite, Netherrack, or anything else you can think of that is locked behind the Nether.
If you think some recipes are unbalanced/not working/missing, let me know in the comments section💬!


### Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ):

**▶Q:** How do i see the recipes? **A:** You can use recipe-viewing mods like JEI or EMI.

**▶Q:** will removing/adding this addon to an existing world causes problems? **A:** You can safely delete/add this mod from any world without issue.

**▶Q:** will this mod ever come on fabric? **A:** It is available for Fabric, but only on Curseforge, you just need to [click here!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-create-netherless)

**▶Q:** Is this add-on available for 6.0.x? **A:** Yes it is!

**▶Q:** What next for the mod? **A:** The add-on is currently on pause as we are working on other projects. Nnew content and balancing is planned, with the introduction of ectoplasm for example, but for now, you will need to wait!

**▶**Any others questions? You can join the [Discord Server of the Honeycomb Studios](https://discord.gg/sNqUAAGRst) and ask them there!
